graphiti.description: Shared temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti + Neo4j on host). Domain knowledge — decisions, incidents, vendor rules, client preferences, branch maps. MUST pass group_id on every call to namespace per project. See skills/graphiti-usage for write/query discipline. URL is prompted at plugin enable time (userConfig.graphiti_url) — default is localhost, change to host.docker.internal for in-container consumers.
